package rulefixtures

// scenario for copy_append_idiom_waste: `dst = append(dst, src...)` when `dst` is known empty and `len(src)` is known
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: info.
type Rule472PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario472Positive(records []Rule472PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
